userMessage: Add rise time, fall time, pk2pk, and mean on CH2

response.text: ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Built a server-side verified common TekAutomate flow.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":["Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias \"scope1\" for direct chat apply compatibility."],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"Generated Flow","description":"Common TekAutomate scope flow built server-side from verified commands.","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"SCOPE","steps":[{"id":"1","type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"],"printIdn":true}},{"id":"2","type":"write","label":"Clear existing measurements","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:DELETEALL"}},{"id":"3","type":"group","label":"Add measurements","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"id":"m1","type":"write","label":"Add risetime measurement on CH2","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS1:TYPe RISETIME;MEASUrement:MEAS1:SOURCE CH2"}},{"id":"m2","type":"write","label":"Add falltime measurement on CH2","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS2:TYPe FALLTIME;MEASUrement:MEAS2:SOURCE CH2"}},{"id":"m3","type":"write","label":"Add pk2pk measurement on CH2","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS3:TYPe PK2PK;MEASUrement:MEAS3:SOURCE CH2"}},{"id":"m4","type":"write","label":"Add mean measurement on CH2","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS4:TYPe MEAN;MEASUrement:MEAS4:SOURCE CH2"}}]},{"id":"4","type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"]}}]}}]}
